title: Generate SAS program to create SDTM TE (Trial Elements) domain

inputs.prompt: Write a SAS program to create the SDTM TE (Trial Elements) domain dataset. The program must: (1) Read raw trial elements data, (2) Derive USUBJID and TESEQ (sequential numbering per subject), (3) Map key variables: ETCD, ELEMENT, TESTRL, TEENRL, TEDUR, (4) Handle element definition with start and end rules, duration calculation, (5) Apply variable attributes per SDTM specification, (6) Create a permanent SAS dataset with xport format. The dataset contains approximately 3 records.
